hooks.prompt: Before ending this turn, check whether your last response contained a **material** claim — meaning an assertion about: edits applied, tests passing, builds succeeding, releases/version bumps, migrations completed, deployments succeeded, files created/removed, or verification output. If it did, invoke the `verification-before-completion` skill NOW to produce fresh evidence (command output, exit code, or explicit verification check) supporting each claim. **Explicitly skip** (proceed normally) if your last response was: analysis, planning, design discussion, opinions, research Q&A, summaries of tool output you just read, or any turn where no material action was claimed.
